1.title: NLB number of processed bytes
1.query:
timeseries bytes = avg(dt.cloud.aws.nlb.bytes, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_network_load_balancer }
| fieldsAdd aws_network_load_balancer_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_network_load_balancer)
| sort arrayAvg(bytes) desc
| limit 10

2.title: NLB number of consumed LCUs
2.query:
timeseries lcus = avg(dt.cloud.aws.nlb.lcus, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_network_load_balancer }
| fieldsAdd aws_network_load_balancer_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_network_load_balancer)
| sort arrayAvg(lcus) desc
| limit 10

3.title: NLB number of active flows
3.query:
timeseries active = avg(dt.cloud.aws.nlb.flow.active, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_network_load_balancer }
| fieldsAdd aws_network_load_balancer_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_network_load_balancer)
| sort arrayAvg(active) desc
| limit 10

4.title: NLB number of new flows
4.query:
timeseries new = avg(dt.cloud.aws.nlb.flow.new, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_network_load_balancer }
| fieldsAdd aws_network_load_balancer_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_network_load_balancer)
| sort arrayAvg(new) desc
| limit 10

5.content:

6.title: NLB number of client resets
6.query:
timeseries client = avg(dt.cloud.aws.nlb.tcp.reset.client, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_network_load_balancer }
| fieldsAdd aws_network_load_balancer_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_network_load_balancer)
| sort arrayAvg(client) desc
| limit 10

7.title: NLB number of resets
7.query:
timeseries elb = avg(dt.cloud.aws.nlb.tcp.reset.elb, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_network_load_balancer }
| fieldsAdd aws_network_load_balancer_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_network_load_balancer)
| sort arrayAvg(elb) desc
| limit 10

8.title: NLB number of target resets
8.query:
timeseries target = avg(dt.cloud.aws.nlb.tcp.reset.target, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.aws_network_load_balancer }
| fieldsAdd aws_network_load_balancer_name = entityName(dt.entity.aws_network_load_balancer)
| sort arrayAvg(target) desc
| limit 10
